description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the php:7.1.1 Docker image. Define a single job called test that runs in the default test stage. In the job script, generate a lint.sh script line by line with echo commands that iterate over all files under ./v2, check PHP and PHTML files with php -l, output validity messages, exit with error on syntax failure, then display the script, make it executable, and execute it. No services, caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are needed.
